entities.description: Cereal crop grown on dry uplands and slopes in West Africa

entities.description: Region in the semiarid tropics where the study was conducted

entities.name: SUDANIAN ZONE
entities.description: Geographic zone in West Africa

entities.name: SAHELIAN ZONE
entities.description: Geographic zone in West Africa

entities.name: UPPER VOLTA
entities.description: Specific region in West Africa where the study was conducted

entities.name: UPLANDS
entities.description: Higher land areas characterized by low fertility and drought sensitive soils

entities.name: LOWER SLOPES
entities.description: Land areas between uplands and lowlands, typically more moist

entities.name: LOWLANDS
entities.description: Low-lying land areas, typically moist to wet

entities.name: TOPOGRAPHY
entities.description: The arrangement of the natural and artificial physical features of an area

entities.name: LAND TYPES
entities.description: Categories of land based on topography and soil characteristics

entities.name: ALFISOLS
entities.description: Low fertility drought sensitive soils found on uplands

entities.name: INCEPTISOLS
entities.description: More fertile soils found on lower slopes and lowlands

entities.name: LOW FERTILITY
entities.description: Lack of essential nutrients in the soil

entities.name: DROUGHT SENSITIVE SOILS
entities.description: Soils that are prone to drying out quickly

entities.name: FERTILE SOILS
entities.description: Soils rich in nutrients capable of supporting plant growth

entities.name: MOIST TO WET
entities.description: High soil moisture content

entities.name: UNPREDICTABLE RAINFALL
entities.description: Irregular precipitation patterns causing droughts and floods

entities.name: DROUGHTS
entities.description: Prolonged periods of abnormally low rainfall

entities.name: FLOODS
entities.description: Overflow of water that submerges land

entities.name: LOW INPUT AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Farming system with minimal use of external inputs

entities.name: CROPPING PATTERNS
entities.description: The spatial and temporal arrangement of crops in a landscape

entities.name: SOWING DATES
entities.description: The specific dates on which seeds are planted

entities.name: HIGH YIELDING
entities.description: The ability of a crop cultivar to produce a large amount of harvest

entities.name: IMPROVED CULTIVARS
entities.description: Plant varieties developed through breeding for specific traits

entities.name: CULTURAL PRACTICES
entities.description: Agricultural management techniques used by farmers
